message:
feat(harness): extension compatibility matrix tagging and acceptance test wiring

- Add tag_named_entries() and tag_module() helpers for batch-tagging contract
  entries by name or module in the extension parity matrix
- Wire new acceptance tests for JSON1, FTS3, and FTS5 modules referencing
  bd_t6sv2_14_extension_compatibility_matrix test file:
  - connection_runtime_wired_extension_surfaces_dispatch_through_connection_path
  - connection_runtime_unwired_extension_surfaces_fail_closed
  - connection_runtime_state_tags_document_extension_reachability
- Add tags for extension categories: wired/unwired state, reachability
- Add comprehensive extension compatibility matrix test suite verifying
  connection-level extension dispatch and state documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
